name: Florida Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the grated orange rind to the mixture and continue creaming.
3. Gradually add the lightly beaten egg, followed by the orange juice.
4. Sift in the all-purpose flour, cinnamon, and baking powder.
5. Mix until a dough forms.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 325°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Shared by Deb, Posted to Fabfood 11/98
Contributor: JGreene274@aol.com (Bakery Shoppe)
